backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the UK Formations backend with user profile management, formation order submission/retrieval, business name availability checking, and role-based access control for users and admins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with file paths, component dependencies, test IDs, and confidence levels, covering VAT Registration and PAYE Registration catalog entries, detail pages, navigation, and services page sections.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend file paths to short summaries describing each file's purpose, covering pages, components, hooks, and the services catalog including the new VAT and PAYE registration additions.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'UK Formations', linking the favicon and Inter font, and mounting the React root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes, including new routes for VAT Registration and PAYE Registration service detail pages.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteLayou: Site-wide layout component providing the sticky header with desktop/mobile navigation (including a Services dropdown with a Tax & Compliance sub-group for VAT and PAYE), authentication controls, and a footer with service links.
frontend/src/components/Section.tsx: Reusable section wrapper component that applies consistent vertical padding and a max-width container to its children.
frontend/src/components/services/Service: Renders a responsive comparison table of three formation packages (Basic, Standard, Premium) with feature checklists, pricing, and a select button that saves the chosen package to the formation draft and navigates to the wizard.
frontend/src/features/formationWizard/fo: Defines TypeScript interfaces for all formation wizard entities (Director, Shareholder, PSC, FormationDraft) and exports a default empty draft object used as initial state.
frontend/src/features/formationWizard/st: Wizard step component that collects up to three company name preferences and the company type via form inputs, displaying validation errors from the parent.
Wizard step component that collects the applicant's full name, email, and phone number with validation error display and a privacy notice card.
Wizard step component for adding, editing, and removing company directors, rendering a dynamic list of director forms with personal detail fields and per-field validation errors.
Wizard step component for managing Persons with Significant Control (PSC), allowing users to add/remove PSC entries with personal details and checkboxes for nature-of-control options.
Wizard step component that lets users choose between providing their own registered office address or using a service address, conditionally showing address/postcode inputs with validation errors.
A read-only review step component that displays a summary of the entire formation draft (package, company details, registered office, directors, shareholders, etc.) before final submission.
A wizard step component for managing shareholders, allowing users to add/remove shareholders, allocate shares, and configure share capital with validation error display.
A wizard step component for selecting up to 4 SIC codes, supporting manual entry, quick-add from a list of common codes, and removal via badge UI.
frontend/src/features/formationWizard/su: Provides utilities to convert a FormationDraft to an API order input, and to save/load/clear an OrderConfirmation object in sessionStorage.
frontend/src/features/formationWizard/us: A custom React hook that manages FormationDraft state with sessionStorage persistence, exposing updateDraft and clearDraft helpers.
frontend/src/features/formationWizard/va: Contains per-step validation functions for the formation wizard (company basics, registered office, directors, shareholders, PSCs, SIC codes, and contact info), each returning a map of field-level error messages.
frontend/src/features/packages/packagesC: Defines the Package interface and exports a static catalog of three formation packages (Basic, Standard, Premium) with prices and feature lists.
frontend/src/features/services/servicesC: Defines a `Service` interface and exports a catalog array of UK business services across four categories: company formation, registered office, business support, and compliance.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile, formation orders, admin checks, and company name availability.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for a professional UK corporate light/dark theme using forest green and charcoal colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminExportPage: Admin-only page that shows the project file structure and provides a copy-to-clipboard button; guards access by checking Internet Identity authentication and admin role via `useIsCallerAdmin`.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminOrderDetai: Admin page that fetches and displays full details of a single order by ID (customer info, company details, parsed additional details) with access control requiring a logged-in identity.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminOrdersPage: Admin page that lists all formation orders in a table with customer name, business name, formation type, and email, with a button to navigate to each order's detail page; guards access via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page component with a contact form (name, email, phone, subject, message) and a sidebar displaying contact info such as email, phone, address, and business hours.
frontend/src/pages/FaqPage.tsx: Renders a FAQ page with an accordion-style list of common questions about UK company formation, including topics like timelines, registered office, PSC, and packages. Includes a call-to-action button linking to the formation wizard.
frontend/src/pages/FormationWizardPage.t: Multi-step company formation wizard page that manages step navigation, per-step validation, draft state, and final order submission via a mutation hook. Renders eight sequential steps (basics, office, directors, shareholders, PSC, SIC codes, contact, review) with progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Marketing home page displaying a hero section, key benefits, core service cards, and a numbered how-it-works process with links to the formation wizard and pricing pages.
frontend/src/pages/HowItWorksPage.tsx: Informational page explaining the UK company formation process through step-by-step cards, a requirements list, and a timeline showing processing stages from submission to certificate delivery.
frontend/src/pages/legal/PrivacyPolicyPa: Renders the UK Formations Privacy Policy page with sections covering data collection, usage, sharing, security, user rights, and contact information. Uses a prose layout within Section components.
frontend/src/pages/legal/TermsOfServiceP: Renders the UK Formations Terms of Service page covering agreement terms, fees, processing times, liability limitations, and governing law. Structured with Section components and prose styling.
frontend/src/pages/NameCheckPage.tsx: Page that lets users check UK company name availability by submitting a search form, then displays an available/unavailable/error result using a query hook.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage: Displays a post-submission order confirmation page showing order ID, company name, package details, and submission timestamp loaded from local storage via `loadConfirmation`. Shows a fallback card if no confirmation data is found.
frontend/src/pages/PricingPage.tsx: Renders a pricing page listing all formation packages from the catalog with features and prices, allowing users to select a package which saves it to the formation draft and navigates to the wizard.
frontend/src/pages/services/BusinessSupp: Service landing page for business support and compliance offerings, displaying benefit cards and service listings fetched from the services catalog by 'support' and 'compliance' categories.
frontend/src/pages/services/CompanyForma: Service landing page for UK company formation, showcasing benefits, a package comparison table via ServiceComparisonTable, and formation types sourced from the 'formation' category of the services catalog.
frontend/src/pages/services/PAYERegistra: Dedicated service page for PAYE employer registration, displaying pricing from the services catalog, benefit cards, and a four-step process walkthrough for HMRC registration.
frontend/src/pages/services/RegisteredOf: Service landing page for registered office and business address solutions, listing benefits such as privacy protection and mail handling, with service cards populated from the 'office' catalog category.
frontend/src/pages/services/VATRegistrat: A dedicated service detail page for VAT Registration, displaying a hero section with pricing, benefits cards, VAT scheme comparisons, and calls-to-action following the standard service page layout pattern.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: Displays an overview of all UK Formations services grouped by category (formation, office, support, compliance) plus featured tax services (VAT and PAYE registration) with links to detail pages.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers for persisting values to/from sessionStorage and cleaning sensitive params from the URL.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH-based design tokens for colors, custom border radii, box shadows, font families, and accordion keyframe animations, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file recording the current version, architectural notes, and existing feature definitions for a company formation website adding VAT Registration and PAYE Registration service pages and catalog entries.
